title: K-200 Airframe Environmental Test Report
text:
# K-200 Airframe Environmental Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-423-C. Revision: C. Type: risk-register. Author: Lena Okafor. Created: 2025-02-23. Last modified: 2026-02-22. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1077, P-1009.
